name: Invoicely
description:
__POSSIBLE_UNTRANSLATED__

What Invoicely Does

Invoicely is the "entry-level" choice for agencies that want to get away from manual invoices but aren't ready for a full "Operating System" like Synup. ​It provides a very simple dashboard to send, track, and manage invoices and estimates. It’s perfect for the agency owner who is currently doing everything in Excel.

Source: Invoicely

​Key Features

​🏆 Multi-Business Support: Manage multiple agency brands from one login.

🏆 Simple Estimates: Send quotes that clients can "accept" to turn into an invoice.

🏆 Automated Reminders: Basic "nudge" emails for late payments.

​Benefits of Invoicely

​The learning curve is non-existent. You can be up and running in 5 minutes. It’s also one of the few tools that still offers a functional "Free Plan."

​Pricing

  • ​Free: $0 (5 invoices/month)
  • ​Basic: $9.99/mo
  • ​Professional: $19.99/mo
  • ​Enterprise: $29.99/mo

There are also discounts available when choosing annual billing plans.

​Pros

​✅ Extremely affordable.

✅ Great for managing multiple "side hustles" or brands.

​Cons

​🚫 Very limited customization.

🚫 No project management or client communication tools.

‍

​"I love the convenience for our client to pay the retainer fee directly through the app."
